form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc:
Mr. Reid submitted the
following resolution; which was considered and agreed to

form.official-title:
Making minority party appointments to
certain Senate committees for the 109th Congress.

section.text:
That notwithstanding the provisions
of rule XXV, the following shall constitute the minority party’s membership on
the following standing committees for the 109th Congress, or until their
successors are chosen:

committee-appointment-paragraph.header:
Committee on Banking, Housing,
and Urban Affairs:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text:
Mr. Sarbanes (Ranking Member), Mr. Dodd, Mr.
Johnson, Mr. Reed, Mr. Schumer, Mr. Bayh, Mr. Carper, Ms. Stabenow, and Mr.
Menendez.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header:
Committee on Energy and Natural
Resources:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text:
Mr. Bingaman (Ranking Member), Mr. Akaka, Mr. Dorgan,
Mr. Wyden, Mr. Johnson, Ms. Landrieu, Mrs. Feinstein, Ms. Cantwell, Mr.
Salazar, and Mr. Menendez.

Mr. Kohl (Ranking Member), Mr. Jeffords, Mr. Wyden, Mrs.
Lincoln, Mr. Bayh, Mr. Carper, Mr. Nelson of Florida, Mrs. Clinton, and Mr.
Salazar.

Mr. Conrad (Ranking Member), Mr. Sarbanes, Mrs. Murray,
Mr. Wyden, Mr. Feingold, Mr. Johnson, Mr. Byrd, Mr. Nelson of Florida, Ms.
Stabenow, and Mr. Menendez.

Mr. Johnson (Vice Chairman), Mr. Pryor, and Mr.
Salazar.

Mr. Rockefeller (Vice Chairman), Mr. Levin, Mrs.
Feinstein, Mr. Wyden, Mr. Bayh, Ms. Mikulski, and Mr. Feingold.
